span.p: Section 169: Public servant unlawfully buying or bidding for property (eff: 1...

span.p: Being legally bound as such public servant not to purchase or bid for certain...

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Purchases or bids for that property, either in his own name or in the name of...

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Imprisonment up to 2 years; The property, if purchased, shall be confiscated.
